content_body: Gary & Lissa - Thank you so much for sharing your home with us. I say home because this lofty cabin in the trees is not your typical rental. It is the little things that make a house a home. The walls and furnishings resonate with love, laughter, friendship and fellowship. This was a time for us to step back from the demands of family and job and to carve out some time for ourselves and each other. It has been a well-spring of relaxation. We read the corks and the journals and contributed. Look for us on your blog. Thank you for a most memorable time here.
title: Majestic Lake Offers Relaxation in Blue Ridge, GA
